parameters.specification/query:
DEFINE
    VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
        FILTER(
            KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('NGBA Defects'[Test_Plan])),
            'NGBA Defects'[Test_Plan] = "XX_GB"
        )

    VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
        TREATAS({"MVD_BR_PCIV"}, 'NGBA Defects'[Team_GB])

    VAR __DS0Core = 
        SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
            'NGBA Defects'[Test_Plan],
            'NGBA Defects'[Test Package],
            'NGBA Defects'[Test Case],
            'NGBA Defects'[Defect Id],
            'NGBA Defects'[URL],
            'NGBA Defects'[Defect Multi-Level Category],
            'NGBA Defects'[Defect Description],
            'NGBA Defects'[KPILight],
            'NGBA Defects'[DiffHours_KPI],
            'NGBA Defects'[Defect Status],
            'NGBA Defects'[Priority],
            'NGBA Defects'[Reporter],
            'NGBA Defects'[Processor],
            'NGBA Defects'[Created On],
            'NGBA Defects'[Changed On],
            'NGBA Defects'[Support Team (Name)],
            __DS0FilterTable,
            __DS0FilterTable2,
            "Opened_d_", 'NGBA Defects'[Opened(d)],
            "In_Process_d_", 'NGBA Defects'[In Process(d)],
            "Customer_Action_d_", 'NGBA Defects'[Customer Action(d)],
            "Proposed_Solution_d_", 'NGBA Defects'[Proposed Solution(d)],
            "Rejected_d_", 'NGBA Defects'[Rejected(d)],
            "Wait_for_transport_d_", 'NGBA Defects'[Wait for transport(d)],
            "Wait_for_parent_d_", 'NGBA Defects'[Wait for parent(d)],
            "MinTrafficLight", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('NGBA Defects'[TrafficLight]))),
            "MinDefect_Status", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('NGBA Defects'[Defect Status]))),
            "MinPriority", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('NGBA Defects'[Priority]))),
            "Status_Opened__Clr_code", IGNORE('NGBA Defects'[Status(Opened)_Clr_code]),
            "Status_InProcess__Clr_code", IGNORE('NGBA Defects'[Status(InProcess)_Clr_code]),
            "Status_CustomerAction__Clr_code", IGNORE('NGBA Defects'[Status(CustomerAction)_Clr_code]),
            "Status_ProposedSolution__Clr_code", IGNORE('NGBA Defects'[Status(ProposedSolution)_Clr_code]),
            "Status_Waitforparent__Clr_code", IGNORE('NGBA Defects'[Status(Waitforparent)_Clr_code]),
            "Status_Waitfortransport__Clr_code", IGNORE('NGBA Defects'[Status(Waitfortransport)_Clr_code]),
            "Status_Rejected__Clr_code", IGNORE('NGBA Defects'[Status(Rejected)_Clr_code])
        )

    VAR __DS0PrimaryShowAll = 
        ADDMISSINGITEMS(
            'NGBA Defects'[Test_Plan],
            'NGBA Defects'[Test Package],
            'NGBA Defects'[Test Case],
            'NGBA Defects'[Defect Id],
            'NGBA Defects'[URL],
            'NGBA Defects'[Defect Multi-Level Category],
            'NGBA Defects'[Defect Description],
            'NGBA Defects'[KPILight],
            'NGBA Defects'[DiffHours_KPI],
            'NGBA Defects'[Defect Status],
            'NGBA Defects'[Priority],
            'NGBA Defects'[Reporter],
            'NGBA Defects'[Processor],
            'NGBA Defects'[Created On],
            'NGBA Defects'[Changed On],
            'NGBA Defects'[Support Team (Name)],
            __DS0Core,
            'NGBA Defects'[Test_Plan],
            'NGBA Defects'[Test Package],
            'NGBA Defects'[Test Case],
            'NGBA Defects'[Defect Id],
            'NGBA Defects'[URL],
            'NGBA Defects'[Defect Multi-Level Category],
            'NGBA Defects'[Defect Description],
            'NGBA Defects'[KPILight],
            'NGBA Defects'[DiffHours_KPI],
            'NGBA Defects'[Defect Status],
            'NGBA Defects'[Priority],
            'NGBA Defects'[Reporter],
            'NGBA Defects'[Processor],
            'NGBA Defects'[Created On],
            'NGBA Defects'[Changed On],
            'NGBA Defects'[Support Team (Name)],
            __DS0FilterTable,
            __DS0FilterTable2
        )

EVALUATE
    __DS0PrimaryShowAll

ORDER BY
    'NGBA Defects'[Defect Id],
    'NGBA Defects'[Test_Plan],
    'NGBA Defects'[Test Package],
    'NGBA Defects'[Test Case],
    'NGBA Defects'[URL],
    'NGBA Defects'[Defect Multi-Level Category],
    'NGBA Defects'[Defect Description],
    'NGBA Defects'[KPILight],
    'NGBA Defects'[DiffHours_KPI],
    'NGBA Defects'[Defect Status],
    'NGBA Defects'[Priority],
    'NGBA Defects'[Reporter],
    'NGBA Defects'[Processor],
    'NGBA Defects'[Created On],
    'NGBA Defects'[Changed On],
    'NGBA Defects'[Support Team (Name)]
